landing.subtitle: Type "latte $5" and you're done. AI sorts the category, amount and date for you, and a monthly coach helps you build better spending habits.
landing.uspSubtitle: One minute a day. Rediscover your month.
landing.uspChatDesc: Write "lunch $9" naturally and the AI sorts the category, amount and date. Receipt photos too.
landing.uspCalendarDesc: Actual and upcoming spend on one screen. See what you really have left until next payday.
landing.uspMapDesc: Leave ratings, photos and notes on places you visit. Clearly see where to return and where to skip.
landing.uspCoachDesc: Record regrets, wins and next month's pledge — the AI coach compares with last month and offers warm insights.
landing.cta2Heading: Start today and notice the difference this month.
landing.cta2Subtitle: Signup in 30 seconds. No credit card. Free during beta.

login.subtitle: Log in and start your ledger.

signup.title: Create account
signup.countryHint: Language and currency are auto-set from your country. You can change them anytime in My Page.
signup.agreeRequired: Please agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.intro: Enter the email you signed up with and we'll send a reset link.
forgot.sent: If that email is registered, we sent a password reset link. Check your spam folder if you don't see it. The link is valid for 1 hour.

reset.title: Set new password
reset.invalidDesc: No reset token found. Please use the link from the email.
reset.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
reset.success: Password changed. Please log in again.

stats.setBudgetHint: Set a budget or income to see this →

input.shortcuts: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline
input.guideButton: What can I type? See guide

messages.welcomeHint: Just type the way you'd talk — e.g. "lunch kimbap 4 today". Tap the 💡 button next to the input to see what you can say. Use the Calendar / Places / Review / Plan / Balance tabs to wrap up the month, and the ✏️·🗑 icons on each row to edit or delete an entry.
messages.placeRecognized: 📍 "{{name}}" detected. Open the entry to pick the exact spot.
messages.recurringRecorded: 🔁 {{count}} saved as recurring. Edit or delete them on the [Recurring expenses] page.
messages.askRecurrenceEnd: 🔁 Got it as a recurring expense. When should it end? e.g., 2027-12-31 / 24 months / 5 years

place.title: My spending map
place.intro: {{count}} places · tap a pin or card for map, photos and reviews
place.emptyPins: No pinned locations yet. Tap a place card to pick the exact spot.
place.aiHint: (The AI-guessed location may be inaccurate, so no pin is auto-placed.)
place.noResults: No results. Try another keyword or leave the location empty.
place.tapMapToPickLocation: Tap the map to pick the exact location

reflect.noteHint: Write a pledge — it shows up in next month's Plan tab automatically.
reflect.aiCoachSubtitle: An objective look back at your month
reflect.aiEmpty: Press the button above to start

regret.label: Regret
regret.placeholder: e.g. spent too much on coffee

insight.label: Insight
insight.placeholder: e.g. eating out drives cafe spend up

balance.title: Balance sheet
balance.subtitle: Your month from an accounting view

plan.lastMonthPledge: Last month's pledge · keep it going this month
plan.bigPictureSubtitle: Sketch the flow before it happens
plan.nextPledgePlaceholder: e.g. cafe only twice a week

year.yearCategoriesTitle: Where you spent most over the year

inputGuide.title: How to chat with your ledger
inputGuide.subtitle: Just write the way you'd talk. The AI figures out amount, category, date and place.
inputGuide.summaryBody: "What, how much, (optional) when / where" — that's enough.
inputGuide.summaryExample: today at Starbucks Bucheon I spent 6500
section4Tips: ※ The AI only recognises the name — open the entry to pin the exact spot.
section5Tips: friend's birthday gift 50000 on the 5th of next month
section6Tips: Tap the 📷 on the left to upload a receipt — the AI extracts items, amount and date automatically
section7Tips: Wrong category? Edit it with the ✏️ button next to the entry
inputGuide.tabsHint: ✏️ Use the pencil/trash icons next to each entry to edit or delete individually.
notAllowed: · Messages without an amount (e.g. "went to a cafe today") — include the amount
· Questions unrelated to your ledger (weather, news, etc.) — this is for ledger only
· Personal IDs (full card numbers, government IDs) — never type them

tabs.calendar: Calendar — tap a day to see that day's spend & upcoming
tabs.places: Places — places you visit often, on a map with photos
tabs.reflect: Review — note wins, regrets and pledges each month
tabs.plan: Plan — capture upcoming expenses for the month ahead
tabs.balance: Balance — income, spend and saving rate at a glance

region.title: Region / Language / Currency
region.subtitle: Change the ledger display currency and UI language. Existing entry numbers stay the same.
region.applyDefaults: Apply defaults of the selected country

recurring.title: Recurring expenses
recurring.helpText: Register a recurring expense once (monthly/weekly/yearly) and it shows up on the calendar automatically. E.g., loan interest on the 16th, weekly Monday lunch club fees.
recurring.empty: No recurring expenses yet. Use + Add row below to start.
recurring.confirmDelete: Delete this rule? All future occurrences disappear too.

validation.endDateRequired: Please set an end date (required for recurring)
validation.endDateAfterStart: End date must be on or after start date
validation.missingEndDateTitle: {{count}} recurring expense(s) missing an end date.
validation.missingEndDateBody: Without an end date the calendar can't display them correctly. Fill in the "End date" column on the highlighted rows.

pricing.title: Moa AI Ledger Pricing
pricing.subtitle: All features are free during the beta period.
pricing.betaDesc: All features are free until general availability. No payment is required to try the full ledger today.
pricing.freeDesc: 30-day free trial. Full ledger features included.
pricing.paidPriceNote: ≈ US$3.99 · prices may vary by country / currency
pricing.paidDesc: Recurring billing starts after trial. Cancel anytime.
pricing.paymentDesc: Korean users pay via Toss Payments; international users pay via Paddle (global merchant of record). Card details are stored by the payment provider — we only display the last 4 digits and brand.
pricing.paymentIntl: 🌍 International: Paddle (card, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay — coming soon)
pricing.cancelDesc: Cancel anytime in My Page → Billing. You keep access until the end of the paid period.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.subtitle: How and when refunds are granted at Moa AI Ledger.
refund.section1Body: Within 14 days of payment we offer a full refund regardless of usage. (Limited to one refund per member.)
refund.section2Body: When you cancel, the next renewal stops. Already-billed months are treated as service period and are not refunded. We will review pro-rated refunds when service downtime caused unused time.
refund.step1: My Page → Billing → click "Cancel" (stops next renewal).
refund.step2Suffix: with your order ID and account email.
refund.step3: Processed within 3–5 business days per the payment provider's policy (Toss / Paddle).
refund.notRefundable1: Forced cancellation due to Terms violation or account suspension
refund.notRefundable2: Payments made using someone else's identity or fraud-detected payments
refund.section5Body: Disputes about this policy are governed by Korean law, with jurisdiction in the Seoul Central District Court. For international users, Paddle's refund/dispute policies may also apply.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms govern use of Moa AI Ledger (the "Service"). Creating an account constitutes acceptance.
terms.a1Body: These Terms set out the rights, obligations and responsibilities of the provider ("Company") and members.
terms.a2Body: The Company provides: expense and upcoming-expense tracking, monthly reviews, place reviews, AI classification and insight, data export, multi-language and multi-currency support.
terms.a3Body: Members are responsible for the security of their accounts and must not post information that infringes others' rights or misuse the service.
terms.a4Body: Paid plans renew monthly by default. Prices are charged in the currency shown on the Pricing page; price changes are announced at least 30 days in advance.
terms.a5Body: Members may cancel anytime via My Page. Cancellation stops the next renewal; the remaining paid period remains usable.
terms.a6BodyPrefix: Refund criteria and procedures follow the
terms.a7Body: The Company may change or temporarily suspend the service for operational or technical reasons, with prior notice to members.
terms.a8Body: The Company is not liable for damages caused by force majeure or member fault. AI-generated classifications and insights are provided for reference and accuracy is not guaranteed.
terms.a9BodyPrefix: Collection, use and provision of personal data follow the separate
terms.a10Body: Members own the ledger data they input. The Company does not provide such data to third parties without the member's explicit consent.
terms.a11Body: Disputes regarding these Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea, with jurisdiction in the Seoul Central District Court.
terms.a12Body: Payments are processed as the legal merchant by Toss Payments (Korea) or Paddle.com Market Limited (international; coming soon). The Company does not store card numbers or expiry dates — only the payment result, card brand and last 4 digits are kept for display.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Moa AI Ledger takes member privacy very seriously and complies with applicable laws.
privacy.s1Required: Required: email, password (hashed), nickname (optional), country / language / currency
privacy.s1Generated: Generated during use: expense records, places, photos, reviews, reflection text
privacy.s1Auto: Auto-collected: IP, browser info, cookies, Google Analytics traffic stats (cookie-based, non-PII)
privacy.s2b: AI classification and insight generation (anonymized statistics sent to Anthropic Claude API)
privacy.s2c: Incident response, usage analytics, payment processing
privacy.s3Body: Card numbers, expiry dates and CVCs are collected and processed directly by Toss Payments (Korea) or Paddle (international) — they are never stored on Moa AI Ledger servers. We only retain payment result, card brand and the last 4 digits of the card number for display in billing history.
privacy.s4Anthropic: Anthropic (USA) — anonymized text sent for AI classification and insight
privacy.s4Toss: Toss Payments (Republic of Korea) — domestic payment processing
privacy.s4Paddle: Paddle.com Market Limited (UK) — international payment processing (coming soon)
privacy.s4R2: Cloudflare R2 (global) — photo file storage (when enabled)
privacy.s5Body: We delete account data 30 days after withdrawal. We retain data longer if required by applicable law.
privacy.s6Body: Members can request access, correction, deletion or withdrawal at any time. My Page → Export also provides a JSON download of your own data (GDPR Article 20).
privacy.s7Body: We use cookies / localStorage to keep you logged in, remember your language and measure Google Analytics traffic. You may block these in your browser settings; some features may be limited as a result.
privacy.s8Body: For inquiries and rights requests, contact:
